allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total: {len\(data\)}''''\); prices=[d[''''price''''] for d in data]; print\(f''''Price 0: {prices.count\(0\)}''''\); print\(f''''Price > 0: {len\([p for p in prices if p > 0]\)}''''\); print\(''''Sample prices:'''', prices[:10]\)")
